items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，但光看参数没用，能不能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: WARDEN: Endangered Indigenous Language Transcription and Translation with 6 Hours of Training Data
items.title_cn: 监狱长：濒危土著语言转录和翻译， 6小时培训数据
items.summary: This paper introduces WARDEN, an early language model system capable of transcribing and translating Wardaman, an endangered Australian indigenous language into English. The significant challenge we face is the lack of large-scale training data: in fact, we only have 6 hours of annotated audio. Ther...
items.summary_cn: 本文介绍了监狱长，这是一种能够将濒危的澳大利亚土著语言Wardaman转录和翻译成英语的早期语言模型系统。我们面临的重大挑战是缺乏大规模的训练数据：事实上，我们只有6个小时的注释音频。...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents
items.title_cn: EVA-Bench ：评估语音代理的新端到端框架
items.summary: Voice agents, artificial intelligence systems that conduct spoken conversations to complete tasks, are increasingly deployed across enterprise applications. However, no existing benchmark jointly addresses two core evaluation challenges: generating realistic simulated conversations, and measuring qu...
items.summary_cn: 语音代理是进行口头对话以完成任务的人工智能系统，越来越多地部署在企业应用程序中。然而，没有现有的基准共同解决两个核心评估挑战：生成逼真的模拟对话和测量...
items.comment: 基准测试成绩亮眼，但测试集和实际场景是两码事，别被数字忽悠。

items.title: Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition
items.title_cn: 通过Hodge分解保持拓扑结构的神经算子学习
items.summary: In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, ena...
items.summary_cn: 本文从函数空间的角度研究几何网格上物理场方程的解算子。我们揭示了Hodge正交性通过将不可学习的拓扑自由度从可学习的几何动力学中分离出来，从根本上解决了光谱干扰，...
items.comment: 学术界的新尝试，能否转化为实用产品？时间会给出答案。

items.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Anthropic's Latest Model
items.title_cn: Claude 3.5十四行诗- Anthropic的最新型号
items.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet with improved reasoning and coding capabilities.
items.summary_cn: Anthropic发布了具有改进的推理和编码功能的Claude 3.5 Sonnet。
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model

items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
